task_completion.description: Verify that the Business Partner record for 'Seed Farm Inc.' is open in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere Business Partner window is open, and the name field or record header clearly displays 'Seed Farm Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SO Credit Limit is set to 75,000.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SO Credit Limit' field contains the value '75,000.00' (or '75000').

task_completion.description: Verify that the SO Credit Status is set to 'Credit Watch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SO Credit Status' dropdown or field displays 'Credit Watch' (or the verified code 'W').

task_completion.description: Verify that the Payment Rule is set to 'On Credit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payment Rule' dropdown or field displays 'On Credit' (or the verified code 'P').

task_completion.description: Verify that the changes to the Business Partner record have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved successfully' notification is visible, the save icon is greyed out/disabled (indicating no unsaved changes), or the status bar indicates the record is saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the iDempiere GUI rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface being navigated and modified, not a terminal or database client (like pgAdmin or psql).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual iDempiere application and did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard iDempiere layout, menus, tabs, and form fields are visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write a script or text file containing the task parameters to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the specific form fields of the iDempiere Business Partner window, not a generic text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target business partner is 'Seed Farm Inc.'. In iDempiere, the SO Credit Status 'Credit Watch' corresponds to the internal code 'W', and the Payment Rule 'On Credit' corresponds to the internal code 'P'. The VLM should accept either the full text ('Credit Watch', 'On Credit') or the corresponding verified codes ('W', 'P') in the respective fields.
